message:
🐛 fix(acmm): trees API branch, RepoPicker Input, header doc (#8271) (#8322)

Addresses 3 actionable Copilot review comments on merged PR #8260:

- Netlify function (acmm-scan.mts): `git/trees/HEAD?recursive=1` is not a
  valid GitHub REST call (HEAD is git-CLI shorthand, not a tree SHA).
  Resolve the repo's default_branch via /repos/{owner}/{repo} first, then
  use the branch name in the trees URL. Falls back to "main" if the repo
  info response omits default_branch.
- Netlify function header: expanded the output shape comment to match
  implementation (detectedIds/weeklyActivity/fromCache/demoFallback) and
  document why the field is detectedIds rather than detectedLoops (the
  registry now includes non-loop criteria from Fullsend/AEF/claude-reflect).
- RepoPicker: replaced raw `<input>` with the shared `<Input>` component
  to satisfy the no-restricted-syntax lint rule and inherit consistent
  styling. The datalist-driven recent-repos suggestion list, clear-X
  overlay, and aria attributes are preserved.

Already addressed (verified, no change needed):
- acmm in ALL_STATS_DASHBOARD_TYPES
- Weekly activity search pagination (SEARCH_MAX_PAGES=10)
- useCachedACMMScan refresh category ('costs' = 10 min)
- IntotoSupplyChain i18n (`common:common.searchLayouts` already uses the
  explicit namespace prefix)
- totalCriteria uses ALL_CRITERIA.length (source-aware), not hardcoded 33

Not addressed (design-level, out of scope for this follow-up):
- intoto_supply_chain card bundled in an ACMM PR (can't unbundle after
  merge; future PRs will keep unrelated cards separate)
- Criterion catalog duplication between Netlify function and frontend
  sources/ — intentional because Netlify Functions are self-contained and
  bundling the frontend TS sources requires additional build plumbing

Fixes #8271

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,8 @@
 import { useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
 import { RefreshCw, X, ExternalLink, AlertCircle, Award, Copy, Check } from 'lucide-react'
 import { Button } from '../ui/Button'
+import { Input } from '../ui/Input'
+import { cn } from '../../lib/cn'
 import { useACMM, DEFAULT_REPO } from './ACMMProvider'
 import { ALL_CRITERIA } from '../../lib/acmm/sources'
 
@@ -73,13 +75,14 @@ export function RepoPicker() {
           className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 min-w-[300px]"
         >
           <div className="relative flex-1">
-            <input
+            <Input
               ref={inputRef}
               type="text"
               value={input}
               onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
               placeholder="owner/repo"
-              className="w-full px-3 py-2 pr-8 rounded-md bg-secondary/50 border border-border text-sm font-mono focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/40"
+              inputSize="md"
+              className={cn('font-mono', input && 'pr-8')}
               list="acmm-recent-repos"
               aria-label="GitHub repository"
             />
